violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
Handsinks in the restrooms were lacking notification signage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
An air gap is lacking on the food prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2025
The doors to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

The 1 door North American refrigerator was observed held at 55-60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. -Staff voluntarily disposed of foods above 41 degrees F. during this inspection. -Establishment shall not store TCS foods in the 1 door North American refrigerator until it is able to consistently maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees F. or below. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023
